title: Save and Confirm Actuals
content:
ACT-006 — Save and Confirm Actuals 

Module: Confirmation Workflow 

Tags: regression, smoke 

Priority: High 

Description: 

Verify that a user can save and confirm actuals for a past week. 

 

Acceptance Criteria: 

User should be able to login to the application with valid credentials. 

User should be able to navigate to the Actuals page. 

User should navigate to a past week. 

User should be able to click Save and Confirm. 

Week status should change from In-Progress to Confirmed. 

User should see success notification. 

Confirmed status should persist after refresh. 

 

Test Data: 

url: https://qa.cioptimize.app 

username: auto.tester@yopmail.com 

password: Test@1234 

weekType: Past Week
